name: DXStorm.com Inc.
summary: DXStorm.com Inc. provides services related to medical application software development, e-commerce, and Internet based solutions in Canada and the United States. The company offers e-commerce services comprising DXshop, a turnkey e-store solution for small to medium businesses; DXcart, an e-commerce enabler for Websites on various platforms; DXweb, a Website development and hosting solution for companies; and DXGreenGate online payment solution. It also provides medical image analysis; Web hosting and mail services; retail payment solutions, such as DXCard; software development and custom programming services; and management services, as well as resells hardware. The company is headquartered in Oakville, Canada.
